items.name_en: The iconic Baguette small handbag features a flap design with FF magnetic closure. Lined with a zip pocket. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody. Mirror effect silver leather material. Decorated with FF embossed pattern. Palladium metal finish. Size 19cm 0191SM85

items.name_cn:
Small White
Brand new FEND1 First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, the first FEND1, subverting the previous bag shape, metal trim large Logo lock plus body design combines architectural deconstruction with fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Handheld for evening parties is full of aura, crossbody also has a high-end street chic feel!
Large 127 Dimensions 32.5x15x23.5cm
Small 129 Dimensions 26x9.5x18cm
Mini 56831 Dimensions 11.5x5.5x10cm

Large 127 Dimensions 32.5x15x23.5cm
Small 129 Dimensions 26x9.5x18

items.name_en: The new large size First is here!!
items.name_cn:
The new large size First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, this is the first Fendi bag under his direction, revolutionizing the previous silhouette. The metal trim, large Logo lock, and body design combine architectural deconstruction with fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for clutching at a dinner party, and chic for a shoulder carry!
Large 127B108 Dimensions 32.5x15x23cm
Small 129B98 Dimensions 26x9.5x18cm
